# Bluetooth Finder
> The best bluetooth finder app to quickly locate AirPods, smartwatches, headphones, and other Bluetooth devices. Use hot & cold guidance and proximity tracking to find lost gadgets instantly.
## Main sections
- [Home](https://bluetoothfinderapp.com/): Bluetooth device finder app — landing, features, and download
- [FAQ](https://bluetoothfinderapp.com/#faq): Questions about the app, accuracy, and supported devices
- [Localized pages](https://bluetoothfinderapp.com/): Hreflang landing pages for supported markets
## Key facts
- Product type: iOS app to find lost or nearby Bluetooth devices (e.g. AirPods, smartwatches, headphones)
- App Store: https://apps.apple.com/app/id6756609274
- 5 in-page feature highlights (scan, hot & cold, proximity %, device details, and more)
- OS: Requires iOS 17.1 or later
- App size: 50.9 MB
- Age rating: 4+
- Software version: 1.1
- Supported page languages: 7
- Last build date: 2026-04-26
## How it works
1. Install from the App Store and allow Bluetooth when prompted.
2. Scan for devices and pick the one you are looking for.
3. Move using hot & cold cues and the proximity percentage until you are next to the device.
